loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative energy (kWh/kVArh) for this month — per-member data is aggregated from live feeders; capacity/target/marker are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy trend by feeder (UPS, BPDB, HHF); rated and contracted reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power (kVA) and reactive power (kVAr); rated capacity and peak markers are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing peak demand and load factor (derived from active power); HHF feeder data is not available for this panel.
